arts.ttl: Rennes enter talks with Marseille for Ismaël Koné
arts.sum: According to a report from Fabrizio Romano, Stade Rennais have entered discussions with Olympique de Marseille for midfielder Ismaël Koné (22). The Canadian international became the first signing in a…

arts.ttl: Stuttgart defender on the verge of joining Rennes
arts.sum: Stuttgart center-back Anthony Rouault is about to return to Ligue 1 with a move to Stade Rennais.

arts.ttl: Monaco and Strasbourg in the running to acquire Carney Chukwuemeka from Chelsea
arts.sum: Two French sides are among the many seeking to add Carney Chukwuemeka (21) to their squad before the winter transfer window closes on Monday. Fabrizio Romano reports that AS Monaco…

arts.ttl: Stuttgart’s Anthony Rouault to join Rennes for €15m
arts.sum: After rejecting an opening offer from Rennes for Anthony Rouault, the Stuttgart defender will now join the Ligue 1 side for a reported €15m, according to Sky Germany. The Frenchman…

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt to sign Arthur Theate on permanent basis from Rennes
arts.sum: Florian Plettenberg reports that Eintracht Frankfurt will sign Belgian defender Arthur Theate from Rennes on a permanent basis for a base fee of €13m plus a further €6m in bonuses.…

arts.ttl: Rennes agree €15m deal to sign Stuttgart centre-back Anthony Rouault
arts.sum: Ligue 1 side Rennes have agreed a deal with VfB Stuttgart to sign French centre-back Anthony Rouault (23), according to L’Equipe. The 23-year-old will return to France after joining Stuttgart…

arts.ttl: Strasbourg predicted XI v Rennes: Andrey Santos and Diego Moreira set to start
arts.sum: Strasbourg face Rennes this Sunday at Roazhon Park for Ligue 1’s matchweek 20. The in-form Alsatians will look to extend their unbeaten streak. Strasbourg are unbeaten in Ligue 1 since…

arts.ttl: Rennes predicted XI v Strasbourg: Kyogo Furuhashi set for Ligue 1 debut
arts.sum: Rennes host Strasbourg this Sunday at Roazhon Park at 5:15 pm CET. The 16th-placed Ligue 1 team have just parted ways with Argentine head coach Jorge Sampaoli and appointed Habib…

With all the changes Rennes are currently undergoing and their difficult period, it’s hard to see how they will cope with the intensity Strasbourg has displayed since the start of the season. Liam Ro...

arts.ttl: Lazio Could Miss Out on Another Target as Southampton Submit Offer
arts.sum: Southampton have reportedly made a concrete offer for RC Strasbourg defender Abakar Sylla who has been on top of Lazio’s shortlist. The Background In addition to their quest to sign a new midfielder, the Biancocelesti are also in the market for a new centre-back, with Sylla emerging as their primary candidate as of late.
